process_compliance_notes: Deep research with 5 parallel Pass 1 agents + 2 Pass 2 verification agents
T20 tally: 7 confirmed, 1 corrected, 1 extended, 6 new findings
All 11 categories presented one at a time
User corrected Cat 11 assessment — convergence loops applicable for fix verification
learnings: Lowest category: Institutional Memory (3/10) — spec-implementation gap is biggest risk; audit for implementation not just specification
Most common gap type: missing schemas/formats (7 of 56 decisions) — skills reading/writing files must include schemas
Recurring pattern: scope confusion between neighbors — every shared ecosystem skill needs differentiation matrix + routing tree
